title: Web Application Server Error Spike
description: Detects HTTP 500 Internal Server Error responses which may indicate successful injection attacks causing application errors, or application instability from attack traffic.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Response Code' = '500' or 'Response Code' = '502' or 'Response Code' = '503')))
